eng.definition: (of a person) reserved or uncommunicative in speech; saying little
examples: The taciturn man rarely spoke at meetings.
Despite being taciturn, he was a good listener.
Her taciturn nature made her seem mysterious.

hin.definition: The practice of training people to obey rules or a code of behavior
examples: मैंने उसे अनुशासन में रखने के लिए कहा.
अनुशासन हमारे जीवन का एक महत्वपूर्ण हिस्सा है.
हमें अपने आपको अनुशासित करना चाहिए.
